name: Chivaho
description_short: Chivaho Federal Credit Union is a community-focused credit union based in Chillicothe, Ohio, offering member-owned financial services including auto loans, mortgages, credit cards, and personal loans.
description_long:
Chivaho Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving the Chillicothe, Ohio community. The credit union has been operating for at least 78 years, as evidenced by their 2026 annual membership meeting marking their 78th year. They maintain two physical locations: a main office at 190 N. Bridge St. in downtown Chillicothe and a VA Campus Branch at 17273 ST RT 104, both operating during standard business hours with Saturday availability at the main location.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products. These include auto financing with rates starting at 4.49% APR with 90-day deferred payment options, Visa credit cards at 9.90% fixed APR, mortgage lending programs (Conventional, FHA, and VA loans) with competitive rates and low closing costs up to 30-year terms, and a "Here for You" personal loan program providing up to $3,500 at 5.99% APR for unsecured borrowing. They also provide digital banking services, bill pay, audio teller access, ATM/debit cards, and educational resources through their MoneyEd financial literacy program. Student loan referrals are available through partnerships with Sallie Mae.

Chivaho distinguishes itself through its community credit union positioning—emphasizing personalized service while maintaining institutional strength. Their marketing explicitly positions them as "small enough to know you personally" while being "strong enough to provide the financial services you need." They recently upgraded their digital banking infrastructure with a new mobile app featuring biometric login and streamlined remote deposit capture. Their mortgage program specifically highlights competitive closing costs "among the lowest in the industry" and personalized guidance from mortgage professionals for various loan products.

Honestly assessed, Chivaho is a solid regional credit union serving local community needs with competitive rates and member-focused governance. However, as a smaller institution, their product range is more limited than national banks or large credit unions. Their geographic footprint appears limited to the Chillicothe area, making them accessible primarily to local members or those able to conduct business remotely. The credit union's emphasis on personalized service is genuine but depends on direct relationship-building rather than technological innovation, which may not appeal to digitally-first consumers.
services: Auto financing (new and used vehicles with rates from 4.49% APR)
Mortgage lending (Conventional, FHA, VA loans up to 30 years)
Personal loans ("Here for You" loans up to $3,500 at 5.99% APR)
Online and mobile banking with biometric login
pros: Auto loan rates starting at 4.49% APR with 90-day deferred payment option and no prepayment penalties
Mortgage programs with explicitly stated competitive closing costs and flexible loan options (Conventional, FHA, VA)
Unsecured personal loans up to $3,500 at 5.99% APR requiring no collateral with fast approval
Recently upgraded digital banking platform with biometric login and mobile app capabilities
Fixed-rate Visa credit card at 9.90% APR with transparent pricing
Same interest rates for both new and used vehicle purchases
Member-owned structure with governance transparency and annual membership meetings
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Chillicothe, Ohio area with only two physical branches
Smaller institution may have less competitive rates or product variety compared to national credit unions
"Here for You" loan offer can be discontinued without notice, indicating promotional uncertainty
Auto warranty program availability requires separate inquiry with limited transparency on pricing
Limited information on membership eligibility requirements or account opening process
best_for: Chillicothe, Ohio area residents seeking community-based banking with personalized service
Auto buyers wanting competitive rates with 90-day payment deferral flexibility
First-time homebuyers in the region needing mortgage guidance and low closing costs
Members prioritizing member-owned governance and local decision-making
diagnosis: Chivaho Federal Credit Union is best for Chillicothe-area residents and local community members seeking competitive rates on auto loans and mortgages backed by personalized, member-focused service. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—membership and in-person services are essentially restricted to the Chillicothe, Ohio area, making this institution inaccessible for consumers outside that region seeking local branch relationships.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
